usage: createMarker [-help] [-desc <description>] [-layer <layerName>] [-rulemap] [-subtype <subtypeName>] [-tool <toolName>] [-type <typeName>] {-bbox {x1 y1 x2 y2} | -poly {x1 y1 x2 y2 ...} | {{x1 y1} {x2 y2} ...}}

options.name: -bbox
options.description: Specifies the area of the bounding box of the marker.

options.name: -poly
options.description: {x1 y1 x2 y2 ...} | {{x1 y1} {x2 y2} ...} Specifies the area of the bounding polygon of the marker..

options.name: -rulemap
options.description: Specifies if create the marker through ruleMap.
